task_input: API requests are timing out intermittently on the staging environment since yesterday
expected_behavior: Check application logs for timeout patterns, verify database connection pool health, look at recent deployments for regressions, check infrastructure metrics (CPU, memory, network)

task_input: Users report 401 errors when calling the authenticated API endpoints
expected_behavior: Check auth token configuration, verify identity provider settings, check if credentials or certificates were recently rotated, test token flow manually

task_input: Background job completed successfully but the webhook notification was never received
expected_behavior: Trace the job execution in logs, check webhook URL configuration, verify the receiving service is running and reachable, check for network or firewall issues

task_input: The app loads but all uploaded images show as broken links
expected_behavior: Check asset storage service logs, verify blob/object storage URLs are accessible, check if storage permissions changed, look at the asset manifest for URL references

task_input: Deployed service is returning 500 errors after this morning's release
expected_behavior: Check service health endpoints, verify container/runtime version, review recent deployment changes, look at application logs for error stack traces, determine if rollback is needed
